series_metadata.series_description: Files contain applications, signed loan agreements, check receipt letter, title, paid invoices. Applications are for purchases of equipment or building additions for fire departments.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy of fire department files for three (3) years. Retain loan applications for fire departments not awarded a loan for five (5) years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Computer database information must be retained until loan is paid in full., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
